name: @cinatra-ai/blog-linkedin-writer-agent
description: Stateless LLM-only leaf agent that writes a short promotional LinkedIn post for a published company blog post. Takes companyUrl, postTitle, postExcerpt, blogPostContent, blogPostUrl, destinationType, destinationName and returns { post, notes }. No HITL, no MCP tool calls, no web_search — pure LLM generation.
